\tzpentry{ID5741}{Photon Quantum Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5741 introduces Photon Quantum Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{A}_{photon} = \frac{e\hbar}{2m_e c}\int d^3k \, \mathcal{E}(\mathbf{k})\left[\hat{a}_L(\mathbf{k})e^{i\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{r}} + \hat{a}_R(\mathbf{k})e^{-i\mathbf{k}\cdot\mathbf{r}}\right] \end{equation}
